overall.description: First-person gameplay footage exploring a clinical medical facility with green tiled walls. The player examines an injured man standing beside a wheelchair, then moves past a lab-coated NPC to enter a utility back room. The environment features fluorescent lighting, filing cabinets, medical monitors, and industrial piping.

notable_agents.action: man in dark jacket standing motionless by the window
shirtless man with visible injuries standing immobile next to wheelchair

entered.detail: white and green ceramic tile walls characteristic of medical facilities
tall grey metal cabinets with multiple drawers

segments.scene_description: The player enters a clinical medical room with green tiled walls and fluorescent lighting. A man in a dark jacket stands by the window overlooking construction scaffolding outside, while an injured shirtless man stands motionless beside a wheelchair in the center of the room. Metal filing cabinets line the left wall near stacked cardboard boxes.

scene_state.functional_zone: medical examination area with monitoring equipment

events.description: camera circles around the injured man to examine his wounds from multiple angles

agents.ego_description: circling around the injured man to examine his wounds, then proceeding toward the exit doorway

notable_agents.action: injured man with bruises and cuts on chest and arms standing by the wheelchair
man in white lab coat holding a red cup near the exit doorway

entered.detail: medical monitors displaying vital signs mounted on the wall
yellow and red biohazard waste containers
black office chair near the medical desk
open doorway with green exit sign above leading to back rooms

segments.scene_description: The camera circles the injured man, revealing detailed wounds on his torso and arms. Wall-mounted medical monitors and biohazard bins become visible on the right wall. The metal filing cabinets recede to the left background as the player moves toward an exit doorway where a man in a white lab coat stands holding a cup.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition corridor leading to utility rooms

events.description: passing through the doorway from the medical office into the industrial utility room

agents.ego_description: approaching the exit doorway, passing the lab-coated man, and entering the back utility room

notable_agents.action: man in white lab coat and mask holding a red cup near the exit

entered.detail: illuminated green exit sign above the doorway
yellow caution sign on the wall next to the door
exposed industrial pipes and conduits on the ceiling
grey electrical control panels with switches
metal cart with shelves in the utility room
large dark industrial double doors with small windows

segments.scene_description: The player approaches the exit where a man in a white lab coat stands guard. Passing through the doorway marked with a green exit sign and yellow warning placard, the scene transitions from the clinical office to an industrial utility room with exposed piping and electrical panels. The medical equipment and wheelchair are left behind as the player enters the back area.

agents.ego_description: walking through the utility room toward the large service door at the end

entered.detail: large mechanical equipment and pipes along the left wall

segments.scene_description: Now fully inside the industrial back room, the player moves through a narrow space lined with electrical panels and exposed utility pipes. The green tiles of the medical office are no longer visible. The camera approaches a large dark service door with small observation windows, indicating a possible exit or storage area ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a sterile clinical office into a gritty industrial utility space. It begins by entering a room with green tiled walls and fluorescent lighting, where a man in a dark jacket stands by a window and an injured, shirtless man remains motionless beside a wheelchair. As the camera circles the injured man to reveal wounds on his torso, the view shifts past wall-mounted monitors and biohazard bins toward a man in a white lab coat guarding the exit. The scene then transitions through a doorway marked by a green exit sign and yellow warning placard, leaving the medical equipment behind as the environment shifts from polished tiles to exposed piping and electrical panels. Finally, the camera moves through the narrow industrial corridor, moving away from the clinical area and approaching a large dark service door with small observation windows.
